Operation 'sendEmail' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Send a single asynchronous email with optional personalization and tracking settings.
data.summary_suggestion: Send a single transactional email asynchronously
data.description_suggestion: Sends a single asynchronous transactional email with optional personalization (recipient variables, dynamic content) and tracking settings (opens, clicks, unsubscribes). Requires authentication via bearer token. Accepts SendEmailRequest schema with email content, recipients, and optional tracking parameters. Returns 202 Accepted with message ID for tracking delivery status. Email is queued for asynchronous delivery.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on inputs (SendEmailRequest schema details), outputs (response format, message ID), and side effects (asynchronous queuing). Enhanced version specifies authentication requirement, input schema reference, response status code, and delivery mechanism for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'sendBulkEmail' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description omits critical details: authentication requirement, input format (array of emails), response format (bulk operation ID), and how to track status. Enhanced version clarifies these aspects and references the related getBulkEmailStatus operation, enabling AI agents to understand the complete workflow and plan accordingly.

data.current_description: Send multiple asynchronous emails in a single request. Supports 5-500 emails per request depending on plan.
data.summary_suggestion: Send multiple transactional emails in bulk
data.description_suggestion: Sends multiple asynchronous transactional emails in a single request for efficient batch delivery. Supports 5-500 emails per request depending on subscription plan. Requires authentication via bearer token. Accepts array of email objects with recipients, content, and optional personalization. Returns 202 Accepted with bulk operation ID for tracking processing status and individual email delivery. Emails are queued asynchronously; use getBulkEmailStatus to monitor completion and validation errors.
data.reasoning: Original description omits critical details: authentication requirement, input format (array of emails), response format (bulk operation ID), and how to track status. Enhanced version clarifies these aspects and references the related getBulkEmailStatus operation, enabling AI agents to understand the complete workflow and plan accordingly.

data.current_description: Retrieve all activity data points for a specific domain including sent emails and engagement metrics.
data.summary_suggestion: List domain activity events with filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves activity events for a specific domain including sent emails, opens, clicks, bounces, and other engagement metrics. Requires authentication via bearer token and domainId path parameter. Supports 6 query parameters for filtering and pagination (e.g., date range, event type, limit, offset). Returns paginated list of activity objects with timestamps, event types, and engagement data. Useful for analytics, reporting, and monitoring email campaign performance.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details about a specific activity event identified by activityId. Requires authentication via bearer token and activityId path parameter. Use this operation to investigate individual engagement events or troubleshoot delivery issues.
